source_meta.source_document: Exeter and Trident II official product materials

TRAYS.Tray Notes: Exeter is described by Stryker as one implant and instrument system, while Trident II materials describe simplified trays that complement the new instruments.

COMPONENTS.Component Notes: Official Exeter materials list the Exeter V40 femoral stem range with multiple offsets and lengths.
Official Trident II product materials describe the Trident II acetabular system and Tritanium/PureFix shell family.
Trident II materials explicitly reference X3 polyethylene as a supported bearing option.
Trident II materials explicitly reference the Modular Dual Mobility (MDM) liner option.

PRODUCTS.Product Notes: Official Exeter product page lists product code 0580-1-300 for a 30mm offset 95mm Exeter V40 femoral stem.

row.system_notes: Hybrid hip arthroplasty platform pairing the Exeter cemented femoral stem family with the Trident acetabular system.
